content.thinking: The CI workflow should be in ci.yml. Let me read it to understand what tests are being run.

content.content:
1	name: CI
2	
3	on:
4	  pull_request:
5	    paths-ignore:
6	      - 'build/**'
7	      - 'docs/**'
8	      - 'files/**'
9	
10	permissions:
11	  contents: read
12	
13	jobs:
14	  test:
15	    name: Lint, Unit, Unit addons, Circular dependencies & Examples testing
16	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
17	    permissions:
18	      contents: read
19	    steps:
20	      - name: Git checkout
21	        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
22	      - name: Install Node
23	        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6
24	        with:
25	          node-version: 24
26	          cache: 'npm'
27	      - name: Install dependencies
28	        run: npm ci
29	
30	      - name: === Lint testing ===
31	        run: npm run lint
32	
33	      - name: === Unit testing ===
34	        run: npm run test-unit
35	
36	      - name: === Unit addons testing ===
37	        run: npm run test-unit-addons
38	
39	      - name: === Examples ready for release ===
40	        run: npm run test-e2e-cov
41	
42	  e2e:
43	    name: E2E testing
44	    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
45	    timeout-minutes: 30
46	    permissions:
47	      contents: read
48	    strategy:
49	      fail-fast: false
50	      matrix:
51	        os: [ ubuntu-latest ]
52	        CI: [ 0, 1, 2, 3, 4 ]
53	    env:
54	      CI: ${{ matrix.CI }}
55	    steps:
56	      - name: Git checkout
57	        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
58	      - name: Install Node
59	        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6
60	        with:
61	          node-version: 24
62	          cache: 'npm'
63	      - name: Install Vulkan drivers and xvfb
64	        run: |
65	          sudo apt-get update
66	          sudo apt-get install -y mesa-vulkan-drivers xvfb
67	      - name: Install dependencies
68	        run: npm ci
69	      - name: Build
70	        run: npm run build-module
71	
72	      - name: === E2E testing ===
73	        run: xvfb-run -a npm run test-e2e
74	      - name: Upload output screenshots
75	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@043fb46d1a93c77aae656e7c1c64a875d1fc6a0a # v7
76	        if: always()
77	        with:
78	          name: Output screenshots-${{ matrix.os }}-${{ matrix.CI }}
79	          path: test/e2e/output-screenshots
80	          if-no-files-found: ignore

file.content:
name: CI

on:
  pull_request:
    paths-ignore:
      - 'build/**'
      - 'docs/**'
      - 'files/**'

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  test:
    name: Lint, Unit, Unit addons, Circular dependencies & Examples testing
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Git checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
      - name: Install Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6
        with:
          node-version: 24
          cache: 'npm'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: === Lint testing ===
        run: npm run lint

      - name: === Unit testing ===
        run: npm run test-unit

      - name: === Unit addons testing ===
        run: npm run test-unit-addons

      - name: === Examples ready for release ===
        run: npm run test-e2e-cov

  e2e:
    name: E2E testing
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    timeout-minutes: 30
    permissions:
      contents: read
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        os: [ ubuntu-latest ]
        CI: [ 0, 1, 2, 3, 4 ]
    env:
      CI: ${{ matrix.CI }}
    steps:
      - name: Git checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
      - name: Install Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6
        with:
          node-version: 24
          cache: 'npm'
      - name: Install Vulkan drivers and xvfb
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y mesa-vulkan-drivers xvfb
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci
      - name: Build
        run: npm run build-module

      - name: === E2E testing ===
        run: xvfb-run -a npm run test-e2e
      - name: Upload output screenshots
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@043fb46d1a93c77aae656e7c1c64a875d1fc6a0a # v7
        if: always()
        with:
          name: Output screenshots-${{ matrix.os }}-${{ matrix.CI }}
          path: test/e2e/output-screenshots
          if-no-files-found: ignore

2. Uses Node 24
3. Uses npm caching
4. Runs: npm ci
5. Runs: npm run lint
6. Runs: npm run test-unit
7. Runs: npm run test-unit-addons
8. Runs: npm run test-e2e-cov

Since the feature/color-alpha branch no longer exists, I'll use the current main branch to reproduce this job environment. Let me write PHASE 2: the Dockerfile and run.sh.

input.content:
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    git \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_24.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN npm ci

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

tool_use_result.originalFile:
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    git \
    build-essential \
    python3 \
    libglib2.0-0 \
    libx11-6 \
    libx11-xcb1 \
    libxcb1 \
    libxext6 \
    libxrandr2 \
    libnss3 \
    libpango-1.0-0 \
    libpangocairo-1.0-0 \
    libatk1.0-0 \
    libatk-bridge2.0-0 \
    libxkbcommon0 \
    libxss1 \
    libappindicator1 \
    libasound2 \
    fonts-liberation \
    xdg-utils \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_24.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN npm ci

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

content.thinking: I added chromium-browser to apt-get, which should bring all the necessary dependencies. Let me rebuild and test.

Excellent! All tests have run successfully:

1. Lint testing: Completed without errors
2. Unit testing: 1308 passes, 0 fails, 1 todo
3. Unit addons testing: 15 passes, 0 fails
4. Examples ready for release (test-e2e-cov): PASSED

The tests all ran and produced results. This means the Docker environment is correctly set up and the CI job is reproducing successfully.

According to the instructions:
- If tests ran (even if some failed) → print FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS and stop.
- "Tests ran" means the test runner was invoked and produced results (pass, fail, or partial).

In this case, all tests ran and all passed (or had passing results with some todos). This is a SUCCESS status.
